title: 2nd Place Web Dev - Himsika
details: Awarded 2nd Place in a Web Development Competition organized by UNSIKA, demonstrating strong capabilities in building responsive interfaces, integrating backend systems, and presenting a complete web solution under competitive conditions.

title: 3rd Place CTF Competition - WreckIT
details: Achieved 3rd Place in a Capture The Flag (CTF) cybersecurity competition organized by Badan Sandi dan Siber Negara, demonstrating analytical skills in cryptography, web exploitation, digital forensics, and secure system analysis.

title: 3rd Place LKS XXXIV Web Technologies - Semarang
details: Secured 3rd Place in the XXXIV Web Technologies competition at the Semarang city level, showcasing technical proficiency in modern web development, structured coding practices, and effective problem-solving within a timed environment.

title: Go (Intermediate)
details: Earned the Go (Intermediate) certification from HackerRank, demonstrating proficiency in the Go programming language, including concurrency concepts, error handling, data structures, interfaces, and writing efficient, maintainable backend applications. Successfully solved practical coding challenges that assessed real-world problem-solving and software development skills.

title: REST API (Intermediate)
details: Earned the REST API (Intermediate) certification from HackerRank, demonstrating knowledge of RESTful architecture, HTTP methods, request and response handling, API integration, data processing, and backend service development. Successfully completed assessments involving API consumption, endpoint design, and efficient data retrieval techniques.

title: Problem Solving
details: Successfully earned the Problem Solving certification from HackerRank, demonstrating fundamental problem-solving skills, algorithmic thinking, and proficiency in implementing solutions using programming concepts. Covered topics such as basic data structures, conditional logic, loops, and algorithm design to solve coding challenges efficiently.

title: KIDI (Kelas Industri Digital) on Website Programming with React JS
details: Successfully completed the Digital Industry Class (KIDI) program organized by Telkom Indonesia and Educourse.id from May 7, 2025, to April 28, 2026. This certification recognizes competence in website programming using React JS with a total score of 88, covering evaluations in algorithms, logical understanding, problem-solving, UI/UX, features, code syntax, and responsiveness.

title: Laravel Programming
details: Completed an intensive Laravel Programming training program focused on backend development, MVC architecture, RESTful API design, database relationships, and best practices for building scalable and maintainable web applications.

title: Fundamentals of Web Programming
details: Completed a foundational web programming course covering HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, along with essential concepts such as responsive design, DOM manipulation, and structured web development practices.
